scripts.dev: lsof -ti:1530 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; cargo build -p mhaol-backend --bin mhaol-server && { PORT=1530 cargo run -p mhaol-backend --bin mhaol-server & BACKEND_PID=$!; trap 'kill $BACKEND_PID 2>/dev/null' EXIT; echo 'Waiting for backend on port 1530...'; until curl -s http://localhost:1530/api/ytdl/status > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.5; done; echo 'Backend ready.'; pnpm -r --filter frontend dev; }
scripts.start: lsof -ti:1530 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; { PORT=1530 ./target/release/mhaol-server & BACKEND_PID=$!; trap 'kill $BACKEND_PID 2>/dev/null' EXIT; echo 'Waiting for backend on port 1530...'; until curl -s http://localhost:1530/api/ytdl/status > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.5; done; echo 'Backend ready.'; pnpm -r --filter frontend preview; }
scripts.build: cargo build -p mhaol-backend --release --bin mhaol-server && pnpm -r --filter frontend build
scripts.test: pnpm -r run test && cargo test -p mhaol-backend
scripts.check: pnpm -r run check && cargo check -p mhaol-backend
